expectations.evidence: CLAUDE.md output includes a '## Self-Management' section (lines 139-166) covering when to update profile.md, CLAUDE.md rules ('A training preference should always apply'), and when to create new skills ('A 3+ step workflow recurs with no existing skill').
Recommends 'google-workspace' and 'home-scheduler' MCPs. Design Notes section explicitly states 'No monarch — finance domain.' Monarch Money is not mentioned anywhere in the output.

Three full skill stubs are included under skills/fitness/: weekly-plan/SKILL.md, log-workout/SKILL.md, and progress-check/SKILL.md — all with YAML frontmatter including name, description, and triggers fields.

Section '3. profile.md.example' includes a complete profile.md.example with fitness-relevant fields: Training Goals, Current Program, Key Lifts / Benchmarks, Injuries / Limitations, What Accountability Looks Like for You, and Calendar Setup.

Session Start section explicitly includes: 'After reading profile.md: Check which MCP tools are available in this workspace. For any MCP server listed under "MCP Tools Available" that isn't connected: Tell the user which capabilities are unavailable... Never assume an MCP is connected — always adapt'.
